creator: aa8vb@ipass.net
text:
New port.  Getting reading for XFree86 4.0, GLX, DRI, and 
        3D-hardware accel (whoohoo!)

        --- NOTE --- 

        This port depends on the Python-1.5.2 and Mesa-3.0 fixes included
        in:

           ports/13276: Python port needs a hack for FreeBSD's non-standard
                        /bin/sh read command
           ports/13295: Mesa-3.0 needs patch to fix ELF dependent '.so' loading

        Please apply them first.

How-To-Repeat: 
	Build port.
